backgrounds.name: Urchin
backgrounds.description: You grew up in the merciless streets of a large city.

backgrounds.name: Wanted
backgrounds.description: There's a price on your head, but you have allies.

backgrounds.name: Cult Initiate
backgrounds.description: You know blasphemous secrets and rituals.

backgrounds.name: Thieves' Guild
backgrounds.description: You have connections, contacts, and debts.

backgrounds.name: Banished
backgrounds.description: Your people cast you out for supposed crimes.

backgrounds.name: Orphaned
backgrounds.description: An unusual guardian rescued and raised you.

backgrounds.name: Wizard's Apprentice
backgrounds.description: You have a knack and eye for magic.

backgrounds.name: Jeweler
backgrounds.description: You can easily appraise value and authenticity.

backgrounds.name: Herbalist
backgrounds.description: You know plants, medicines, and poisons.

backgrounds.name: Barbarian
backgrounds.description: You left the horde, but it never quite left you.

backgrounds.name: Mercenary
backgrounds.description: You fought friend and foe alike for your coin.

backgrounds.name: Sailor
backgrounds.description: Pirate, privateer, or merchant — the seas are yours.

backgrounds.name: Acolyte
backgrounds.description: You're well trained in religious rites and doctrines.

backgrounds.name: Soldier
backgrounds.description: You served as a fighter in an organized army.

backgrounds.name: Ranger
backgrounds.description: The woods and wilds are your true home.

backgrounds.name: Scout
backgrounds.description: You survived on stealth, observation, and speed.

backgrounds.name: Minstrel
backgrounds.description: You've traveled far with your charm and talent.

backgrounds.name: Scholar
backgrounds.description: You know much about ancient history and lore.

backgrounds.name: Noble
backgrounds.description: A famous name has opened many doors for you.

backgrounds.name: Chirurgeon
backgrounds.description: You know anatomy, surgery, and first aid.

nord_backgrounds.name: Freed
nord_backgrounds.description: You were a thrall, but escaped or won your freedom.

nord_backgrounds.name: Displaced
nord_backgrounds.description: You fled after a rival jarl attacked your village.

nord_backgrounds.name: Criminal
nord_backgrounds.description: You were exiled from your village for a crime.

nord_backgrounds.name: Drifter
nord_backgrounds.description: You have not yet found a jarl worthy of your loyalty.

nord_backgrounds.name: Crop Farmer
nord_backgrounds.description: You toil in the earth and know all plants.

nord_backgrounds.name: Livestock Farmer
nord_backgrounds.description: You have intuition about all animals.

nord_backgrounds.name: Hunter
nord_backgrounds.description: You know how to move quietly in the wilds.

nord_backgrounds.name: Fisher
nord_backgrounds.description: You know all the sea creatures and legends.

nord_backgrounds.name: Enforcer
nord_backgrounds.description: You enforce the jarl's law in your village.

nord_backgrounds.name: Trader
nord_backgrounds.description: You have mercantile connections in every village.

nord_backgrounds.name: Crafter
nord_backgrounds.description: You can make and fix any utilitarian item.

nord_backgrounds.name: Bowyer
nord_backgrounds.description: You can make and fix any bow or arrow.

nord_backgrounds.name: Seer's Apprentice
nord_backgrounds.description: You know some of the mystic arts.

nord_backgrounds.name: Shipwright
nord_backgrounds.description: You know how to build and repair longboats.

nord_backgrounds.name: Blacksmith
nord_backgrounds.description: Weapons, armor, horseshoes; you do it all.

nord_backgrounds.name: Far Traveler
nord_backgrounds.description: You know many distant people and customs.

nord_backgrounds.name: Skald
nord_backgrounds.description: You are a poet and know all the ancient ballads.

nord_backgrounds.name: Heroborn
nord_backgrounds.description: You are the descendant of a famous warrior.

nord_backgrounds.name: Nobleborn
nord_backgrounds.description: You are the child of a 1d6: 1-5. jarl, 6. king.

nord_backgrounds.name: God's Blood
nord_backgrounds.description: You are descended from a god; it marks you.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Hermit
diabolical_backgrounds.description: The wilds (and its creatures) are your family.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Outcast
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You were thrown out for real or supposed crimes.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Woodborn
diabolical_backgrounds.description: They found you in the hollow of an oak tree.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Amnesiac
diabolical_backgrounds.description: Your past is a haze, but some memories return.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Haunted
diabolical_backgrounds.description: A restless spirit wants something from you.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Fugitive
diabolical_backgrounds.description: An anonymous savior helped you disappear.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Feytouched
diabolical_backgrounds.description: A fairy befriended you in your childhood.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Witchborn
diabolical_backgrounds.description: They burned your mother, but spared you.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Forager
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You know how to find the edible and the deadly.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Redeemer
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You must redeem the name of your kin.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Marked
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You carry an eldritch mark. Is it a curse, or a gift?

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Sacrifice
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You were to be ritually sacrificed, but escaped.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Marooned
diabolical_backgrounds.description: They left you behind, but you refused to die.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Fallen
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You fell from grace. Will you atone, or embrace it?

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Drawn
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You hear a whispered call and follow it.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Ascetic
diabolical_backgrounds.description: People fear you, but seek out your guidance.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Wolfchild
diabolical_backgrounds.description: Long ago, you walked into town wearing pelts.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Healer
diabolical_backgrounds.description: You understand how life and death intertwine.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Chosen
diabolical_backgrounds.description: An eldritch being selected you for a purpose.

diabolical_backgrounds.name: Demonborn
diabolical_backgrounds.description: An ancestor of yours is a powerful demon.
